sections.title: Nautical Intelligence
content: Lapras is highly intelligent and capable of understanding human speech. It is exceptionally gentle and enjoys ferrying people across the ocean on its back.
Due to its peaceful nature, it has been overhunted by humans, bringing it to the brink of extinction.

sections.title: Genetic Mutability
content: Eevee possesses an unstable genetic code that allows it to evolve into various forms depending on its environment.
Its radiation-sensitive DNA can mutate rapidly when exposed to certain evolutionary stones.

sections.title: Terminal Data: Anomalies
content: Eevee holds the record for the most possible branched evolutions of any species in the National Pokédex.

sections.title: Metabolic Extremes
content: Snorlax spends its entire day sleeping and eating. It needs to consume 900 pounds of food daily to feel satisfied.
Its stomach is strong enough to digest even moldy or rotten food without any ill effects.

sections.title: Oceanic Guardian
content: Despite its bulky appearance, Dragonite can fly faster than the speed of sound. It is a kind-hearted Pokémon that leads lost ships in storms back to safety.
In battle, it is nearly unstoppable, capable of unleashing massive elemental attacks.

sections.title: GBL Tactical Analysis
content: A powerhouse in the Master League. Dragon Breath and Dragon Claw provide relentless pressure, while Superpower or Hurricane offers vital coverage.

sections.title: Artificially Engineered Psionics
content: Mewtwo was created by scientists through years of horrific gene-splicing experiments based on the DNA of Mew.
It lacks a sympathetic heart and is said to possess the most savage temperament among all Pokémon.

sections.title: The Genetic Origin
content: Mew is said to possess the genetic composition of all Pokémon. Because it can make itself invisible at will, it is rarely seen by humans.
Scientists believe Mew is the ancestor of all Pokémon species.
